title: My Precious Home Care Elder Care
address: 27 Jalan USJ 1/3B, Taman Subang Mewah, Grandville, 47600 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

updatesFromCustomers.text: My precious home care is the best home healthcare service out there. The staff are very kind, approachable, professional and easy to reach. I would recommend this home care for elderly.

reviews.text: I’m very satisfied with the service provided. The staff are kind, gentle, and treat the elderly with respect and dignity. You can really feel their sincerity and care. Thank you for making things easier for our family.
My granny very well taken care of in here! All of the staff are hardworking and kind to her :)
Very nice and comfortable for elderly very good staff i highly recommended this place you better visit the place see it your own eyes
Good Hospitality, friendly and helpful staff
Provides gentle loving care for the seniors.
Nice place and the staffs are friendly.

When i saw the place its very nice and beautiful elderly here feel like there own home the place is in guarded family surely safe the staffs is friendly also very well taking care of the elderly i recomend this place if your looking a homes for elderly...

The place is very clean and convenient,the staff are very accomodating.

Nice experience.

I highly recommend this place for elderly care the staffs here are very nice and friendly they care with love the elders the place is beautiful like you stay at your own home my experience here very well as the staffs welcome you a wonderful smile place is clean have a garden where you can breathe a fresh air...if you are looking for a place for your love one who needs care who have special need for my taking care of the and help them better visit the place🙏🙏

This nursing home has shown extremely poor standards of care and professionalism.
Family visits are clearly not welcomed — staff show rude and unfriendly attitudes, even telling us not to visit too often.
A nurse shouted and complained that cleaning the patient’s wound delayed her time to go home — completely unprofessional behavior.
The patient, who is unable to walk, soiled her diaper and was left unattended for a long time. The waste spread to the wall and bedsheet, yet staff blamed the patient instead of taking responsibility.
Food is unacceptable — plain porridge mixed with curry powder was served as a meal.

We have photos and records to support these claims. The management should take immediate action to address such negligence and disrespect toward elderly residents.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Ai Lee,

We are very sorry to hear about your experience and truly regret that you and your family felt this way. What you described does not reflect the standard of care and compassion we aim to provide at My Precious Home Care.

We take all feedback seriously and would like to look into this matter immediately. Please contact me directly at 011-7489 9115 so we can review the situation in detail and take the necessary corrective action.

Your feedback is very important to us, and we are committed to ensuring every resident receives proper care, comfort, and respect at all times.

Warm regards,
Managent , My Precious Home Care Centre

reviews.text: The kakak is very good and take care of my grandma very well, they will update some exercises video to us and now my grandma sleep well eat well at there😆

We are deeply grateful for the wonderful care and love your centre has shown to my mother-in-law. The kindness, patience, and gentle attention of your staff have made a truly positive difference in her life. Thank you for treating her with such respect and warmth — it means so much to our family.
Good & caring carers at the centre. They also help take care of daily necessities like purchasing diapers & personal hygiene products. Highly recommended!!
Friendly and take good care for my mother 😊
Mr. Eugene and team very good 👍 Very caring staff. Clean accommodation. Highly recommended.❤️❤️❤️

Dealt with Ms. May & Mr. Eugene, both are really helpful and friendly. Sent my grandma here for her recovery after hip fracture surgery, and she just discharged with the ability to walk again. Recommended.
Very good service and attentive to the elderly

My Precious Home will definitely have a place in my heart where my mom received good care and seeing her smile during her stay really gives me peace and happiness. My real appreciation from the bottom of my heart to all nurses, caretaker and assistant involved. Really good job and a pleasure to know you all. To my mom, Precious Home is part of family. 🙏🙏

My MIL was admitted twice in this Precious Home. Its a good residential care home. Very personalised care extends to social activities and mental stimulation, contributing to the emotional and physical wellbeing of the residents.

The presence of good company, the availability of varied and nutritious meals, and a clean, comfortable living environment are just as important as the provision of any medical or specialist care.

Dr May and Eugene who runs the place are very responsible and dedicated people.
My mum staying a year everything is okay 👍👍

Good place for old aged
Friendly staffs, good environment

My mother was admitted for post op rehabilitation at My Precious Home (MPH) on the 25th of August for a month until 24th September 2025.

To describe if a place was good, one need not go into details. What is important is the feeling when you leave the place.
1. My mother hugged the staff and cried when she knew we were going to leave.
2. The staff cried and were seen wiping their tears as they helped my mother into the car - she had an operation for a fractured femur.

Mom was very fond of Genina (who used to bathe her), Grace (who took good care of her) and Nash (whom she described as a very helpful person).

No other comments are needed to describe how they all took care of her.

As for me, I appreciate all that they did for my mother. Grace was in communication with me whenever necessary.

I also appreciate Eugene who always responded to my communication, Nurse Sally who made sure that my mother took her medications without fail, and also Dr. May.

Thank you My Precious Home. My mother is getting Better and Better!
A place that take care of elderly, service at it fullest
My old age mother was cared by My Precious Home, thanks to Dr May Tan and Eugene for the quick response when any urgent assistant is required.
